pages.text:
LATVIJAS REPUBLIKAS ARLIETU MINISTRIJA

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS OF THE REPUBLIC OF LATVIA

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention on the Organisation for Economic Co-operatior and Development was done at Paris on the 14% day of December, in the year 1960.

AND WHEREAS the Republic of Latvia, being a state entitled to become a party to the said Convention by virtue of Article 16,

NOW THEREFORE I, Edgars Rinkēvičs, Minister of Foreign Affairs of the

Republic of Latvia declare that the Parliament of the Republic of Latvia, having considered and approved the said Convention, undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out the stipulations therein contained. Hereby I formally declare the accession to the Convention on the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and

Development.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have signed this Instrument of Accession and affixed the official seal.

DONE at Riga, this 30 day of June 2016.

dEdgars Rinkēvičs

HIVIAS REPUR nister of Forcign Afairs
